creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robin Haberkorn from comment #16)

> Github MR are considered acceptable for upgrades of existing ports by maintainers?
Yes it is, it depends how comfortable you are with github.

>  They do work in practice?
Absolutely, I use to take some from time to time.
The thing is we have no notification when a new one was submitted,
so you have less committers looking at them.
